denominator.rule: primary metrics use the v0.1 corpus mode-comparison count minus the unresolved set

unresolved.rule: scenarios listed in unresolved.json are excluded from primary metrics and surfaced only in unresolved-set.json

notes: v0.1 smoke corpus is the frozen denominator: append-only; removal requires a contract major bump.
v0.2 paper profile reuses the same corpus and overlays policy / ablation / adversarial / forwarding / enforcement tracks.
direct, git-diff3, file-serial, file-occ, text-range are deterministic baseline models — they are not real external tool executions.
p95 latency is reported as not-measured unless a real timing source is later wired.
